text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Was that... a figment of my imagination? I
could have sworn a voice just called out to me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Surely it wasn't... the Three Goddesses?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Silly me. That would have been stranger
than fiction...
